changes: Updated current phase from 'REST API Layer with DRF' to 'Django Admin & Templates'

features: Dark mode support with dark: prefix utilities
Top header bar with search and notifications
Mobile sidebar overlay with smooth transitions
Orders, Tables & QR, Customers, Analytics, Settings sections

patterns_discovered.description: Three-level hierarchy: base.html -> admin.html/public.html -> specific pages
patterns_discovered.benefit: DRY principle, consistent structure across templates

patterns_discovered.description: Uses x-data, x-show, x-click, x-collapse directives for client-side interactivity
patterns_discovered.benefit: lightweight interactivity without heavy JavaScript framework

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple named blocks (header, navigation, content, main_class, etc.) for flexible override
patterns_discovered.benefit: allows child templates to customize specific sections

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of 'dark:' Tailwind prefix throughout all templates
Responsive classes (lg:hidden, hidden md:block), touch-target class for buttons
Uses Phosphor icons (ph ph-*) consistently throughout
patterns_discovered.benefit: consistent visual language, lightweight icon solution

patterns_discovered.description: Use of {% trans %} and {% load i18n %} tags throughout

gotchas_discovered.description: Logo image uses onerror handler: onerror="this.style.display='none'" for graceful degradation
gotchas_discovered.impact: handles missing static files gracefully but requires correct STATIC_URL configuration

gotchas_discovered.description: Sidebar open state requires Alpine.js x-data initialization at page level
gotchas_discovered.impact: must ensure Alpine.js is properly initialized in base.html or parent wrapper

gotchas_discovered.description: Admin layout assumes user.organization exists and references user.organization.plan, user.organization.logo
gotchas_discovered.impact: requires proper User model extension and organization relationship setup

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses {% url 'admin:index' %}, {% url 'admin:logout' %} which requires proper URL configuration
gotchas_discovered.impact: Django URL config must match namespace and view names exactly

gotchas_discovered.description: Git diff output shows '... (truncated, 56681 chars total)' indicating file is incomplete in the diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: full file content not visible; assumes remaining sections follow same patterns

gotchas_discovered.description: User avatar uses model field directly without fallback handling
gotchas_discovered.impact: requires user model to have avatar field or template will render error

approach_outcome.description: Create templates directory structure with base layout
implementation_strategy: Created base.html template with core structure, Alpine.js initialization, and block definitions
Created admin.html template extending base.html with comprehensive admin dashboard layout
Created public.html template extending base.html for customer-facing pages
Implemented responsive sidebar with mobile overlay
Added i18n support for multi-language capability
Used Phosphor icon set for consistent visual design
deliverables: 3 template files created (base, admin, public layouts)
Dark mode support with Tailwind CSS
Alpine.js interactive components (sidebar toggle, collapsible menus)

completion_metrics.phase_progression: REST API Layer with DRF → Django Admin & Templates

recommendations.recommendation: Create a templates/components/ directory for reusable template components (buttons, forms, modals, cards)
recommendations.rationale: Current structure has only layouts; shared components will reduce duplication and improve maintainability

recommendations.recommendation: Add template tests to verify all block names exist and render correctly
recommendations.rationale: Template inheritance can break silently if child blocks don't match parent block names

recommendations.recommendation: Verify User model has avatar, organization relationship, and profile picture handling
recommendations.rationale: Admin template assumes these fields exist; mismatches will cause rendering errors

recommendations.recommendation: Create static/images/logo.svg and ensure STATIC_URL is properly configured
recommendations.rationale: Logo uses fallback but images should be available for optimal UX

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting Alpine component definitions to separate JavaScript files for reusability
recommendations.rationale: Sidebar toggle logic could be componentized for use in other templates

recommendations.recommendation: Create custom Tailwind config for primary colors and spacing to maintain consistency
recommendations.rationale: Uses primary-* color classes extensively; should be defined in Tailwind config rather than relying on defaults

recommendations.recommendation: Extract all hard-coded strings to translation tags and generate .po files
recommendations.rationale: Strings are wrapped in {% trans %} tags but translation files may not be generated yet

recommendations.recommendation: Document template block structure and inheritance chain
recommendations.rationale: Multiple nested blocks with conditional content requires documentation for future developers

recommendations.recommendation: Consider lazy-loading organization selector and user menu icons to reduce initial payload
recommendations.rationale: Admin layout has significant HTML structure that could be optimized for first paint
